summary: Infrastructure-only PR updating pinned GitHub Actions versions in the build workflow. The only changed file was .github/workflows/build.yml, with version bumps for checkout, artifact upload, Docker registry login, Pages deployment actions, and Cachix/Nix setup actions. The PR body was empty; an automated decomp-dev bot comment reported GALE01 no changes.

key_files.role: GitHub Actions workflow receiving all action version bumps
evidence_refs: raw_diff: all hunks modify uses: action version pins in .github/workflows/build.yml

what_changed: Updated actions/checkout pins from v3 or v4 to v6 in multiple workflow jobs.
Updated actions/upload-artifact from v4 to v7 for map and report uploads.
Updated docker/login-action from v2 or v2.1.0 to v4 in container registry login steps.
Updated actions/upload-pages-artifact from v3 to v5.
Updated actions/configure-pages from v4 to v6 and actions/deploy-pages from v4 to v5.
Updated cachix/install-nix-action from v25 to v31 and cachix/cachix-action from v16 to v17.
smart_moves: Kept the PR narrowly scoped to GitHub Actions version pins in a single workflow file.
Did not mix CI dependency updates with decomp source or data changes, based on the supplied diff.
follow_up_queries: PR 2648 GitHub Actions version bump upload-artifact v7
PR 2648 decomp-dev bot GALE01 No changes
build.yml docker/login-action v4 cachix install-nix-action v31

notes: Evidence is strong for file changes and action version bumps because the full diff is loaded.
PR body is empty and there are no review comments or reviews, so no human rationale or reviewer intent is available.

No decomp source files, assembly, symbols, matching tactics, or naming decisions were present in this PR slice.

source_update_candidates.title: build.yml owns repository CI workflow action pins
source_update_candidates.text: .github/workflows/build.yml contains GitHub Actions workflow steps for checkout, artifact upload, container registry login, GitHub Pages artifact/configure/deploy, and Nix/Cachix setup; PR 2648 updated only the action version pins in these steps.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: version-only changes across checkout, upload-artifact, docker/login-action, pages actions, and cachix actions
source_update_candidates.reason: Candidate path fact for curator review if the knowledge base tracks repository infrastructure ownership; not a decomp standard.

rejection_notes: No reusable decomp lesson is promoted because the PR is infrastructure-only and does not touch decompiled source, headers, data ownership, assembly, or matching output.
The automated 'No changes' comment is recorded as PR evidence only; it is not treated as proof of any specific build matrix success beyond the comment text.
